name: humanspec_ARHGAP11B_gorilla
description: Human-specific duplicon contrast: ARHGAP11B. Status in Gorilla gorilla: 'human_specific_present_only_in_Homo'. In human (GRCh38) the locus sits on chr15:~31.0 Mb; in this ape the syntenic region is approximated on chr15. Used by LLmap to refuse silent absorption of human-vs-ape divergence when mapping cross-species reads.

architecture.internal_structure: Reference contrast for ARHGAP11B. See Dennis 2012, Suntsova 2017, T2T-ape 2024 for duplicon-by-duplicon presence calls.

related_diseases: human-specific cortex expansion / neurodevelopmental dosage (e.g. ARHGAP11B)
